# services.sxhkd

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.sxhkd`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| ----------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------- |
| `services.sxhkd.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable simple X hotkey daemon. |
| `services.sxhkd.extraConfig` | `strings concatenated with “\n”` | Additional configuration to add. |
| `services.sxhkd.extraOptions` | `list of string` | Command line arguments to invoke sxhkd with. |
| `services.sxhkd.extraPath` | | |
| `services.sxhkd.keybindings` | `attribute set of (null or string or absolute path)` | An attribute set that assigns hotkeys to commands. |
| `services.sxhkd.package` | `package` | The sxhkd package to use. containing the sxhkd executable |
